texto: Café Central — open every day! We have coffee, tea, and fresh juice. Breakfast from 7 to 11: bread, eggs and fruit. Lunch from noon to 3: salad, chicken, rice and soup. Prices are cheap: a coffee is two dollars, a sandwich is five dollars. We are near the park, next to the bank. You can pay by card or in cash. Come and visit us!

preguntas.enunciado: El café está cerrado los domingos.
